summary: TWO_COLUMN: 4-state Markov chain with stochastic P displayed as BLUE heatmap of rows. RIGHT ComplexPlane with 4 eigenvalues on unit-circle reference (λ_1=1 RED, others ORANGE inside). Bottom: BLUE bars π_k starting from e_1 via ValueTracker t_tr sweeping 0→30 iterations; YELLOW outline of stationary π* reference.
